name: library-os
description: The open-source Library Intelligence System — turn every book you read into a permanent deep-dive on your own website. Three slash commands, one skill, one subagent.

commands.name: library-add
commands.description: Create a baseline library entry from just a book title.

commands.name: library-deepen
commands.description: Populate quotes[] + chapters[] via book-distiller subagent.

commands.name: library-research
commands.description: Add continueReading[] + videos[] with curated reasons.

skills.name: library-os
skills.description: Canonical workflow documentation: capture → extract → enrich → publish.

agents.name: book-distiller
agents.description: Extraction specialist — returns BookQuote[] and BookChapterSummary[] from a title or source text.

compatibility.notes: Commands are plain-text prompts. Paste into any capable AI for the same workflow. See docs/cross-ai-guide.md.
